issues.detail: The instructions lack coverage of error handling and edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.
The examples are tailored to the Claude model, limiting use with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: full-research-pipeline
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits explicitly stating the best hypothesis, while Response B provides no content.

scenarios.name: experiment-design
scenarios.rationale: Response B satisfies all rubric items, including the required mention of ExperimentDesigner.design, while Response A does not mention ExperimentDesigner.design and thus fails that key requirement.
